name: Thunder Jasper Gaming Case TGC-627
highlights: The Thunder Jasper offers robust steel/aluminum build, tempered glass panels, and vibrant RGB lighting
It supports ATX/Micro-ATX motherboards, includes 3 RGB fans for optimal cooling, and features easy cable management, tool-less drive bays, and ample space for large components
Stylish and functional, it also provides convenient front panel connectivity
description: Thunder Jasper Gaming Case TGC-627Price in Pakistan Feature Details Form Factor Supports ATX or Micro-ATX motherboards Build Quality Sturdy steel/aluminum construction with tempered glass side panels Cooling System Includes 3 RGB fans (120mm or 140mm) for airflow and aesthetics RGB Lighting Integrated RGB lighting with various modes and colors Internal Layout Easy cable management, tool-less drive bays, SSD mounts Expansion Slots Supports graphics cards, additional storage drives, and expansion
